description: A Hydra operative carries out a test of a weapon utilizing technology based on the Obelisk at a navy wedding, resulting in several deaths and panic amongst the guests. Bakshi expresses his disappointment with the limited effect and orders a report to be delivered to Whitehall, setting the stage for Hydra's continued interest in the Obelisk.

transcript.line: The world is full of people seeking change, hoping to become something else, something better. So my first reaction when I heard that Pete joined the navy was, “you've got to be kidding me.“  I mean, this degenerate in the navy? Did they even do a background check? ‘Cause I got two words for you... "Tijuana ‘09.” Yeah, H-bomb knows what I'm talking about.
Any chance you boys got something stronger behind that bar?
But in this case, change is a good thing. Mariya, you are a super-cool chick. And, Pete, you'll always be my boy. So, everyone, raise your glasses to Pete and Mariya, the Leitners.
What's happening?! Oh! Somebody... somebody help! Please, somebody help! Somebody help us!
Some sick, everyone else scared, but very much alive.
How disappointing. Return immediately to give your report personally. Dr. Whitehall will not be pleased to hear that we, again, have failed.
